description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the ruby:2.4 Docker image and defines a single deploy stage. Add a Deployment job that runs in the deploy stage, sets the production environment with URL $HEROKU_APP_HOST, and uses the before_script commands 'gem install dpl' and 'wget -qO- https://cli-assets.heroku.com/install-ubuntu.sh | sh' to install the Heroku CLI. In the script it executes 'dpl --provider=heroku --app=$HEROKU_APPNAME --api-key=$HEROKU_APIKEY', then 'export HEROKU_API_KEY=$HEROKU_APIKEY', and finally 'heroku run --app $HEROKU_APPNAME migrate' to deploy and run migrations on Heroku. The pipeline has no caches, artifacts, services, or conditional rules.
